name: StreakManager

neutralConcepts: userTimezoneOffset is REQUIRED input — never default to UTC
localDate = UTC timestamp + offset — computed at comparison time
streak boundary = midnight in user's local timezone
streakBonus passed to LedgerUpdater — not applied by StreakManager

ironRules.rule: userTimezoneOffset is a REQUIRED input field. T96 must never default to UTC when timezone offset is absent — reject the request.
localDate = UTC timestamp + userTimezoneOffset. Streak boundary comparison uses localDate — never raw UTC date.
streakBonus value is passed to LedgerUpdater (T85) — T96 must NOT apply the bonus itself. Separation of concerns.
Idempotent by (userId, localDate) — same local calendar day does not re-increment the streak.

keywords: streak manager timezone aware local date UTC offset userTimezoneOffset idempotency
